name: 莫塔5问-真相审计
lisp_code:
;; Murtagh's 5-Question Audit Macro v1.0 
;; Logic: Recursive Blind-spot Detection 

(defmacro murtagh-audit (context) 
  `(recursive-process 
    (map (fn (dimension) (audit-step dimension ,context)) 
         '(:PROBABLE :CRITICAL :MISSING :LATENT :UNSPOKEN))))

(defun audit-step (type context) 
  (case type 
    ;; 1. 常见原因 (Find all possible reasons) 
    (:PROBABLE 
     (lambda (c) (exhaustive-search :domain (extract-field c) :threshold :high))) 

    ;; 2. 不可忽视的风险 (Important causes not to be missed) 
    (:CRITICAL 
     (lambda (c) (filter-by-impact :severity :fatal :status :neglected))) 

    ;; 3. 容易遗漏的因素 (Commonly overlooked factors) 
    (:MISSING 
     (lambda (c) (scan-long-tail :pattern :low-frequency :logic :pitfall))) 

    ;; 4. 潜在/掩盖的诱因 (Latent/Masked variables) 
    (:LATENT 
     (lambda (c) (detect-interference :masking-effect T :hidden-nodes T))) 

    ;; 5. 未提及的残差信息 (Integrity/Residual check) 
    (:UNSPOKEN 
     (lambda (c) (evaluate-entropy :source :user-narrative :check :omission))))) 

;; [EXECUTION-PROTOCOL] 
;; 1. 将上下文压入 (murtagh-audit context) 
;; 2. 强制执行递归展开，每一层必须输出其原子推导过程 
;; 3. 最终输出：(reduce-to-optimal-insight (audit-results))
